title: Frontend Developer intern
responsibilities:
Develop and maintain user-facing features using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Build responsive and visually appealing web pages across devices
Work with frameworks like React (or Angular/Vue) to create dynamic UI components
Collaborate with designers and backend developers to implement features
Integrate REST APIs and handle data efficiently on the frontend
Debug, test, and optimize application performance
Ensure cross-browser compatibility and consistency
Write clean, maintainable, and reusable code
Participate in code reviews and team discussions
Stay updated with latest frontend technologies and best practices
